{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Moongrave amphelia
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave amphelia]] trees flourish in abundant [[shadow aura]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave amphelia]] trees were initially taken from [[Everwood]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“They flourish in abundant shadow aura,” said Justice,<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
